---
applyTo: "style.css"
---

# Theme Metadata Instructions

When editing `style.css`, make the theme metadata ATI-specific.

Check and replace duplicated-project drift in:

- `Theme Name`
- `Description`
- `Text Domain`
- `Template`
- `Author` or related branding fields when present
- legacy source-project website references or wording in comments and header metadata

Do not leave legacy source-project naming in the final metadata.

If the correct ATI metadata values are not present in the repository, propose the exact replacements in the PR summary and flag any low-confidence field for review.
